arguments.argument:
playSound(global.snd_EnemyDieMM,0,1,1) tEffect=instance_create(x+16,y+16,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sMMExplosion; tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0 tEffect=instance_create(x+16,y+48,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sMMExplosion; tEffect.newBlend=-1; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0
instance_destroy()
